description: This updated closet essential tops our wish-list this season! For the that new slinky dress you just bought or to dress up an office ensemble, this is the go-to shoe. Stylish yet not over-the-top, this modestly heeled shoe is perfect to make the right impression. heels: 3.5" Upper Satiny fabric glued over synthetic A heel cup for cushioned comfort Lightly padded footbed Criss crossing straps across the ankle Outsole TPU outsole with heel Textured design on the heel for added comfort Shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
